dimensions.label: Output
dimensions.description: How well-defined the output contract is.

dimensions.label: Agent-ready
dimensions.description: Can an orchestrating agent invoke this autonomously?

dimensions.label: Evals
dimensions.description: Quantity and depth of evaluation coverage.

dimensions.label: Use freq
dimensions.description: How often the skill is actually invoked.

skills.name: commit-push-pr

description_quality.evidence: Clear trigger description; well-disambiguated from `commit` and `pr`. Missing an explicit negative-trigger clause.

output_quality.evidence: Output is the commit message + PR URL. **No structured contract** for downstream consumers.

composability.evidence: Terminal — creates a PR; no documented pipeline successor.

agent_readiness.evidence: Safety protocol is strong: pre-commit gates, no `--no-verify` without consent.

eval_coverage.evidence: No eval suite. Highest-frequency command, highest ROI to add evals.

usage_frequency.evidence: Weekly use — core to the development workflow.

karpathy_eligible.evidence: Strong loop candidate: safety-protocol adherence is binary-testable across many commit/PR scenarios.

skills.notes: Highest-frequency command in the portfolio. Safety protocol is good. Output varies per step and lacks a structured contract.
next_actions: Add eval testing safety protocol adherence
Highest ROI target for the next eval-loop pass

skills.name: parallel-explore

description_quality.evidence: Six trigger phrases, references `design-alternatives` as replacement target. Missing explicit negative trigger.

output_quality.evidence: `synthesis.json` schema v1.0 documented. Renderer produces md + html views.

composability.evidence: Output schema well-defined but no explicit upstream/downstream pipeline link.

agent_readiness.evidence: Handles vague input via the 3-variant default; cost-check gate still requires a human.

eval_coverage.evidence: No eval suite for branch quality / anti-convergence yet.

usage_frequency.evidence: Used twice since creation; not yet part of regular workflow.

karpathy_eligible.evidence: Anti-convergence and matrix-coverage are both binary-testable across a synthetic problem set.

skills.notes: Strong forced-divergence pattern. Anti-convergence instruction is the key innovation worth preserving in any eval-loop mutations.
next_actions: Add eval suite with diverse problem domains

skills.name: grill-me

description_quality.evidence: Clear triggers (`grill me`, `poke holes`). No disambiguation against general critique.

output_quality.evidence: Conversational output by design. No schema.

composability.evidence: Pairs with `/spec` upstream; no documented downstream consumer.

agent_readiness.evidence: Conversational nature inherently requires a human counterpart.

eval_coverage.evidence: Not testable without simulating a human discussion partner.

usage_frequency.evidence: Used during spec sessions; not weekly.

karpathy_eligible.evidence: Conversational and human-only — too interactive for the autonomous loop.

skills.notes: Intentionally minimal. Accept that it's a human-only skill and design accordingly.
next_actions: Add lightweight output structure for resolved/deferred/risk items

top_actions.action_text: Add eval testing safety protocol adherence (no --no-verify without consent, no commit on red CI).
top_actions.send_prompt_template: Audit scorecard rank {rank}: improve {skill_name} (`{skill_id}`) — action: {action_text}. Read the scorecard at {scorecard_md_path} for full context before editing.

top_actions.action_text: Add eval suite with diverse problem domains; assert anti-convergence and matrix-coverage invariants.
top_actions.send_prompt_template: Audit scorecard rank {rank}: improve {skill_name} (`{skill_id}`) — action: {action_text}. Read the scorecard at {scorecard_md_path} for full context before editing.

top_actions.action_text: Add a lightweight output structure (resolved / deferred / risk) so downstream skills can read the result without a human.
top_actions.send_prompt_template: Audit scorecard rank {rank}: improve {skill_name} (`{skill_id}`) — action: {action_text}. Read the scorecard at {scorecard_md_path} for full context before editing.
